refusal: Refuse the requested one-off exception for this battery transfer as the default action. The repeated temporary dispatch-note workaround has already failed to close the release-control decision, so another exception would preserve the same uncontrolled condition under higher time pressure.
mechanism_reframe: This is not primarily a battery-transfer urgency problem; it is a release-control ownership failure. Incomplete seal records were repeatedly bypassed locally, the upstream rule remained undecided, and the missing-record condition returned because the system kept accepting temporary notes as substitutes for closure.
upstream_next_action: Escalate to the mountain operations director to close the release-control rule as the controlling decision before any further transfer depends on temporary clearance.
